---
title: Carolina Carrillo
subtitle: Asistente de la Dirección de Investigación
contacto: carolina.carrillo@uchile.cl
github: https://github.com/chincolcarrillo
# web: https://www.linkedin.com/in/katherine-aravena-herrera-791a2933b/
image: featured.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:carolina.carrillo@uchile.cl
      text: Contacto
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/chicolcarrillo
      text: Github
    # - icon: globe
    #   href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/katherine-aravena-herrera-791a2933b/
    #   text: Web Personal
---
